hooks.command: LOCK=/tmp/chhummy-mem-lock; NOW=$(date +%s); if [ -f "$LOCK" ]; then LAST=$(cat "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); DIFF=$((NOW - LAST)); if [ "$DIFF" -lt 60 ]; then exit 0; fi; fi; printf '%s' "$NOW" > "$LOCK"; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"MEMORY UPDATE CHECK: Before this turn ends, review what happened this session. If any new decisions, bugs, user preferences, architecture changes, or feedback were discussed - update the relevant files in .claude/memory/ (project_context.md, user_prefs.md, feedback.md, architecture.md). Then copy the updated files to C:/Users/kusha/.claude/projects/c--Users-kusha-chhummy-tracker/memory/ to keep both locations in sync. If nothing new was learned, skip silently."}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if knowledge base needs updating...
